title: Teaching & outreach.
lede: Years in the lab classroom — and a commitment to bringing people from first principles to real bioinformatics workflows.

experience.org: Department of Bioinformatics & Genomics, UNC Charlotte
experience.detail: Teaching assistant in the bioinformatics & genomics graduate program; also mentor two master's students through computational analysis and interpretation.

experience.org: Department of Biology, Montclair State University
experience.detail: Oversaw lab courses and a team of graduate TAs across the department, coordinated lab scheduling, and designed teaching techniques and instructional materials for undergraduate labs.

experience.org: Department of Biology, Montclair State University
experience.detail: Taught undergraduate labs across Principles of Biology, Microbiology, and SEA-PHAGES; helped expand the SEA-PHAGES genome-sequencing curriculum in collaboration with HHMI.

items.title: silico
items.desc: A terminal course teaching programming and applied bioinformatics across 14 units — Python basics through FASTQ pipelines and a codon-usage capstone.
